text: Awarded the **Springer Nature Editor of Distinction Award 2026** (top 20% Author Service).
Started a new Research Fellowship at UNIMC under the supervision of Prof. Emanuele Frontoni.
**Best Paper Award** at IEEE VR 2025 for _MineVRA: Exploring the Role of Generative AI-Driven Content Development in XR_.
Principal Organizer of the 1st International Workshop on Humans in the eXtended Artificial Intelligence Loop ([HUARL @ ICIAP 2025](https://sites.google.com/view/huarl-iciap-2025/)).
Invited Speaker at the 2nd Physical Retail AI Workshop, IEEE/CVF WACV 2025.
Defended PhD thesis at the University of Bologna.
